GalaxyMinerPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_0_Payout1_0: Win Vortex Symbol and Prize Symbol
GalaxyMinerPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_1_Payout1_1: During any main game spin, Win Vortex symbols and/or Prize symbols with values ranging from 0.5x to %{1000}x of the bet amount may appear on the reels.
GalaxyMinerPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_2_Payout1_2: Each Win Vortex symbol may have 1 to 5 counters attached to it.
GalaxyMinerPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_3_Payout1_3: If 1 or more Win Vortex symbols and Prize symbols appear on the reels, each Win Vortex symbol will use 1 counter to collect the values of all Prize symbols.
GalaxyMinerPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_4_Payout1_4: After using 1 counter, if any Win Vortex symbols have remaining counters left, those Win Vortex symbols with the remaining counters will use 1 counter to collect the values of all Prize symbols again.
GalaxyMinerPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_5_Payout1_5: If no counters remain on any of the Win Vortex symbols, wins equal to the values in the Win Vortex symbol(s) will be paid.
GalaxyMinerPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: 6 or more Prize symbols on the reels will trigger the Bonus Feature.
GalaxyMinerPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2_Payout2_2: At the start of the Bonus Feature, a Persistent Win Vortex symbol is added in the middle row of the 2nd reel, and the Persistent Win Vortex symbol will collect the values of all Prize symbols.
GalaxyMinerPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_3_Payout2_3: 3 bonus spins are awarded and every new Prize symbol or new Win Vortex symbol will reset the bonus spin counter back to 3.
GalaxyMinerPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_4_Payout2_4: During any bonus spin, if 1 or more Prize symbols appear on the reels, the Persistent Win Vortex symbol will collect the values of all Prize symbols.
GalaxyMinerPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_5_Payout2_5: During any bonus spin, if 1 or more Win Vortex symbols and Prize symbols appear on the reels, each Win Vortex symbol will use 1 counter to collect the values of all Prize symbols.
GalaxyMinerPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_6_Payout2_6: After using 1 counter, if any Win Vortex symbols have remaining counters left, those Win Vortex symbols with the remaining counters will use 1 counter to collect the values of all Prize symbols again.
GalaxyMinerPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_7_Payout2_7: If no counters remain on any of the Win Vortex symbols, the Persistent Win Vortex symbol will collect the values of all the Prize symbols and Win Vortex symbols.
GalaxyMinerPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_8_Payout2_8: Win Vortex symbols with collected values will remain on the reels until the Bonus Feature ends, while the Persistent Win Vortex symbol will collect the value of the Win Vortex symbol on every Bonus Spin.
GalaxyMinerPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_1_Payout3_1: The maximum win amount is %{5000}x of the bet amount.
GalaxyMinerPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_2_Payout3_2: If the total win in the main game or the Bonus Feature reaches %{5000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.

GalaxyMinerRule.Rule1_1: Galaxy Miner is a 3-reel, 3-row video slot featuring win collector symbols and prize symbols up to %{1000}x.
GalaxyMinerRule.Rule1_2: The game is played with 20 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GalaxyMinerRule.Rule1_21: Bonus Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Bonus Feature.
